InstanceBatchResizeBySpec.instanceIdList: Set of instance IDs for batch operation, up to 30
InstanceBatchResizeBySpec.enableJumboFrame: Whether to enable Jumbo Frame for the instance. true: enable, false: disable. Default is empty: when resizing to a spec that does not support Jumbo Frame, it will not be enabled; when resizing from a non-supporting to a supporting spec, it will not be enabled; when resizing between supporting specs, Jumbo Frame state follows the pre-resize setting.
